positive: A minimalist, vibrant line-art illustration featuring a whimsical, interconnected forest scene. The central element is a stylized, glowing crescent moon visible through the canopy of diverse, oversized leaves and ferns. Incorporate silhouettes of friendly, stylized woodland creatures (like deer, foxes, and owls) subtly integrated into the flora. The overall composition should be highly detailed yet clean, with strong contrast between solid black lines and negative space. Use a palette of deep emerald green, sapphire blue, and warm gold accents, rendered in a clean, graphic, tattoo-style linocut aesthetic. Highly symmetrical, perfect composition, suitable for central apparel placement, vector style, white background isolation, deep focus, studio lighting.
negative: blurry, noise, low detail, ugly, text, watermark, signature, logo, dirty, noisy, artifacts, bad anatomy, disfigured, grayscale, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, cropped, copyright, trademark
